name: Powder Green Zari Lehenga
description: Elegant powder blue lehenga with intricate silver zari work.
stylistNotes: Looks stunning at reception nights or grand events.
materialCare: Avoid washing. Use steam ironing only.

name: Beige Green Princess Lehenga
description: Shimmering beige lehenga with flared volume and sleeveless blouse.
stylistNotes: Make a royal entrance at any reception or wedding night.
materialCare: Dry clean recommended. Use garment bag for storage.

name: Ivory Gold Woven Lehenga
description: Ivory gold lehenga with shimmering dupatta and embroidered blouse.
stylistNotes: Pair with polki jewelry for a traditional yet glam look.
materialCare: Store folded in tissue paper. Avoid perfume contact.

name: Sapphire Indo-Western Set
description: Chic sapphire blue lehenga with embroidered jacket and crop top.
stylistNotes: Best worn for cocktail parties and sangeet night.
materialCare: Hand wash cold. Use mild detergent.

name: Olive Musturd Lehenga
description: Olive musturd lehenga with heavy detailing and full sleeves.
stylistNotes: An elegant choice for haldi or mehendi functions.
materialCare: Use soft brush to clean mirrors. Dry clean only.
